Despite winter blues, expectations remain high - The first week of the New Year saw limited action

BDRY
Dry Bulk Shipping
January 9, 2024
Breakwave Dry Futures Index: 1,513 Baltic Dry Index (spot): 2,022 Short-term Indicators:
↑ 30D: 0.9% ↓ 30D: -18.6% Momentum: Negative
↑ YTD: 0.9% ↓ YTD: -3.4% Sentiment: Positive
↑ YOY: 37.4% ↑ YOY: 78.9% Fundamentals: Neutral
Bi-Weekly Report
• Despite winter blues, expectations remain high - The first week of the New Year saw limited action as it relates to
Capesize fixing. Geographically the tables have turned, with the Pacific spot market having weakened materially to
below 20,000 while the Atlantic remains short in tonnage, at least for the month of January, with the respective
spot rate sitting above 40,000 for the N. Yet, the futures market indicates significant deterioration
